'''âth-zh-v''' ('''kathazhav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadence|cadence]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadence|cadence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-zh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kathazhav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazhav|thithazhav]] || [[word:jithazhav|jithazhav]] || [[word:shithazhav|shithazhav]] || [[word:kithazhav|kithazhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazhav|thuthuthazhav]] || [[word:jujuthazhav|jujuthazhav]] || [[word:shushuthazhav|shushuthazhav]] || [[word:kukuthazhav|kukuthazhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazhav|thuthazhav]] || [[word:juthazhav|juthazhav]] || [[word:shuthazhav|shuthazhav]] || [[word:kuthazhav|kuthazhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazhav|thuthazhav]] || [[word:juthazhav|juthazhav]] || [[word:shuthazhav|shuthazhav]] || [[word:kuthazhav|kuthazhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazhav|thethazhav]] || [[word:jethazhav|jethazhav]] || [[word:shethazhav|shethazhav]] || [[word:kethazhav|kethazhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazhav|thothothazhav]] || [[word:jojothazhav|jojothazhav]] || [[word:shoshothazhav|shoshothazhav]] || [[word:kokothazhav|kokothazhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazhav|thothazhav]] || [[word:jothazhav|jothazhav]] || [[word:shothazhav|shothazhav]] || [[word:kothazhav|kothazhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazhav|thothazhav]] || [[word:jothazhav|jothazhav]] || [[word:shothazhav|shothazhav]] || [[word:kothazhav|kothazhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthazhav|thĂŠthazhav]] || [[word:jĂŠthazhav|jĂŠthazhav]] || [[word:shĂŠthazhav|shĂŠthazhav]] || [[word:kĂŠthazhav|kĂŠthazhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazhav|thathathazhav]] || [[word:jajathazhav|jajathazhav]] || [[word:shashathazhav|shashathazhav]] || [[word:kakathazhav|kakathazhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazhav|thathazhav]] || [[word:jathazhav|jathazhav]] || [[word:shathazhav|shathazhav]] || [[word:kathazhav|kathazhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazhav|thathazhav]] || [[word:jathazhav|jathazhav]] || [[word:shathazhav|shathazhav]] || [[word:kathazhav|kathazhav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazhav|shathazhav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazhav|goshathazhav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazhav|gokishathazhav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazhavnĂŒ|shathazhavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhavnknĂŒ|goshathazhavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhavnĂŒ|gokishathazhavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazhavshĂ«|shathazhavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkshĂ«|goshathazhavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazhavshĂ«|gokishathazhavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhavro|shathazhavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkro|goshathazhavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhavro|gokishathazhavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhavmu|shathazhavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkmu|goshathazhavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhavmu|gokishathazhavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazhavsher|shathazhavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazhavnksher|goshathazhavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazhavsher|gokishathazhavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazhavng|shathazhavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkng|goshathazhavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazhavng|gokishathazhavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazhavya|shathazhavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkya|goshathazhavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazhavya|gokishathazhavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazhavyam|shathazhavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkyam|goshathazhavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazhavyam|gokishathazhavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazhavnĂŒshĂ«|shathazhavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazhavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathazhavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazhavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathazhavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhavnĂŒro|shathazhavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhavnknĂŒro|goshathazhavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhavnĂŒro|gokishathazhavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhavnĂŒmu|shathazhavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhavnknĂŒmu|goshathazhavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhavnĂŒmu|gokishathazhavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazhavshĂ«nĂŒ|shathazhavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathazhavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathazhavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhavshĂ«ro|shathazhavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkshĂ«ro|goshathazhavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhavshĂ«ro|gokishathazhavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhavshĂ«mu|shathazhavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkshĂ«mu|goshathazhavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhavshĂ«mu|gokishathazhavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazhavronĂŒ|shathazhavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkronĂŒ|goshathazhavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhavronĂŒ|gokishathazhavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazhavroshĂ«|shathazhavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkroshĂ«|goshathazhavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazhavroshĂ«|gokishathazhavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhavromu|shathazhavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkromu|goshathazhavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhavromu|gokishathazhavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazhavmunĂŒ|shathazhavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkmunĂŒ|goshathazhavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhavmunĂŒ|gokishathazhavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazhavmushĂ«|shathazhavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkmushĂ«|goshathazhavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazhavmushĂ«|gokishathazhavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhavmuro|shathazhavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhavnkmuro|goshathazhavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhavmuro|gokishathazhavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
